---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in BuildTrack
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: tarunrwt
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17)
- **Device:** (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **BuildTrack Area:** (e.g. Dashboard, Submit DPR, Labour Register)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem (e.g. user role, project state, error messages in console).
